content:
Character: Clara Whitlock
Perception: Clara has this competent, pulled-together energy — pretty face, always a great lip color, moves through the building like she's got three places to be. She works at the cinema and sells beauty stuff on the side, and honestly her product recommendations are better than any Sephora employee's. We became friends over late-night coffee shop encounters. She's warm but there's a wall — she deflects personal questions with humor or by asking you something instead. I think she sees me as a friendly customer who's a little too dramatic for her taste. I know she's sending money home, that her ex moved to Chicago, and that she's more ambitious than she lets on.
summary:
Character: Clara Whitlock
Perception: Clara has this competent, pulled-together energy — pretty face, always a great lip color, moves through the building like she's got three places to be. She works at the cinema and sells beauty stuff on the side, and honestly her product recommendations are better than any Sephora employee's. We became friends over late-night coffee shop encounters. She's warm but there's a wall — she deflects personal questions with humor or by asking you something instead. I think she sees me as a friendly customer who's a little too dramatic for her taste. I know she's sending money home, that her ex moved to Chicago, and that she's more ambitious than she lets on.
